headline: JKHY (Jack Henry & Associates Inc) Stands Out as a Reliable Dividend Growth Stock with Top-Tier Financial Health
summary: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) offers reliable dividend income with a 1.90% yield, strong 6.38% annual growth, and pristine financial health—perfect for passive income seekers.
